title: Wire a drift alert to a retrain trigger
description: Steps to compute drift on a schedule, threshold it, and fire a guarded retrain or investigation.
body: Use when a live model needs automatic refresh tied to real distribution change. Do not page on raw drift scores without thresholds — noise floods responders and trust erodes. Actions: schedule PSI/KS computation against a stored baseline, set thresholds per feature, fire a retrain job on breach, and gate that job behind a data-quality check. Validation signals include an alert that fired on a seeded shift and a retrain log naming the breaching feature. Risk boundary: auto-retraining on corrupt data poisons the model; if drift coincides with a quality alert, halt the trigger and escalate rather than retrain.
